title: QUA-344-C2 Compile Binding (.ex5 reproducible)
body:
Parent: QUA-344
Owner: Dev

Scope
- Confirm EA source/build path.
- Produce compile-pass `.ex5` for assigned `ea_id`.
- Document exact compile command.

Acceptance
- Compile succeeds from clean workspace.
- `.ex5` output path documented and reproducible.
